title: Vietnamese Kho Pilchard Stew
description: A traditional Vietnamese fish stew made with pilchards in a rich, spicy sauce. This dish is best served with steamed rice.

ingredients.name: pilchards
ingredients.notes: any small fish works, but pilchards are traditional

instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Fry onions until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add fish sauce, toasted fish paste, and water.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add pilchards and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
